value_chain_position: Semiconductor test equipment (Automated Test Equipment, ATE) for logic/memory/5G, plus collaborative robot arms (Universal Robots) for factory and lab automation.
relative_comps: Teradyne leads in logic ATE (SoC test) with ~50% share; its memory test segment benefits from HBM complexity growth. Universal Robots is the leading cobot franchise globally by installed base but faces intensifying competition from FANUC, ABB, and low-cost Chinese entrants (Doosan, Aubo). The AI-driven chip-test thesis is solid (more complex chips need more test time per wafer); the cobot business is earlier-stage and lower-margin. 3-year revenue CAGR near flat (0.4%) reflects the semiconductor test cycle; YoY recovery (+30%) indicates trough-to-ramp. Trades at ~35x forward earnings.
